name: PreviewRefs
visual_summary: PreviewRefs displays a list of external references in a paragraph when provided a list of refs and a URL prefix. It's used when listing external resources, similar content, or references from other sources.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics: Name: PreviewRefs Description: PreviewRefs displays a list of external references in a paragraph when provided a list of refs and a URL prefix. It's used when listing external resources, similar content, or references from other sources. Style: minimal Interactions: hover Tags: reference, external link, list Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
